The canvases are 6-inch circles. They are stretched and primed. Each 100% cotton canvas comes individually wrapped.

I will be recommending these Arteza Stretched canvases to family and friends.

This 4-Inch Brayer Rollers for Crafting works great. I used the brayer to smooth out my vinyl on the mat before cutting it worked better than not having one. I also plan to use it for my diamond paintings.

The set comes with a brayer, a tool for removing vinyl, and a really nice pair of tweezers. The tool could also be used for removing cardstock from the mat. The tweezers can be used for putting those tiny little pieces of vinyl or cardstock where they should go easier than with your fingers.

I will be recommending these 4-Inch Brayer Rollers for Crafting to family and friends.

These Dyvicl Black Micro-Pen Fineliner Ink Pens worked great. I used them for drawing fine lines on my handmade cards. The smaller one is 0.05 and I use it if I want to add just a little outline on some of my stamps. I also love the brush pen for a bolder look on borders.

The set comes with 9 pens. The pens range from 0.05, very small to a brush pen, which can be larger than the 0.8 liner pen. These pens are good for drawing or in my case outlining.

I will be recommending these Dyvicl Black Micro-Pen Fineliner Ink Pens to family and friends.

These Dyvicl Metallic Markers Metallic Brush Pens look great. The colors are vibrant and easy to use. I used them on white and black paper and they looked great on both. These brush pens work well for calligraphy too.

The set comes in 15 colors. They are water-based and acid-free. The tops don't have the exact color of the pen, the tops are a little muted compared to the actual pen color.

I will be recommending these Dyvicl Metallic Markers Metallic Brush Pens to family and friends.

These Dyvicl Fineliner Fine Point Pens are adorable. They have small tops with color for the color of the pen. The problem I had was that 2 out of seven pens I tried were dry, with no ink in them. I hate that because I have used a lot of pens by Dyvicl and I love their products. I use these pens for handmade cards and I will be able to use the other colors it is just disappointing to have some with no ink.

The set some with 60 adorable fine liner pens. There is a wide variety of colors and the ones that worked looked great. These pens are water-based and the color did not seep through the paper.

I will be recommending these Dyvicl Fineliner Fine Point Pens to family and friends.

This Dyvicl Watercolor Paint Set has beautiful colors. I used them for some handmade card fronts and the paint looked great. I used the paintbrush to add color to my paper and I think it looks great.

The Paint Set comes in 36 beautiful colors. The set has a paintbrush, a water brush, two sponges, a pencil, a tube of white paint, and 8 pieces of paper. All of this comes in a metal case.

I will be recommending this Dyvicl Watercolor Paint Set to family and friends.

These Dyvicl Metallic Marker Pens are gorgeous. I used them to color in some stamped images on my cards. The colors are a little darker than the cap would suggest but they looked great on my cards.

The pens are water-based ink and acid-free! There are 9 gorgeous colors. I used these pens for cards but they would also work for other things, like paint rocks. The color is vibrant on white paper but the box says there will be a difference between light and dark paper. I didn't try the dark paper.

I will be recommending these Dyvicl Metallic Marker Pens to family and friends.

This Watercolor Paper 9x12 Inch is great. I love the thickness of this paper. The paint went on the paper smoothly and the paper did not peel like some watercolor paper. I love this paper!

The paper is 9 inches by 12 inches. It is a140lb which is a great weight for watercolor paper in my opinion. It will be perfect for making my handmade cards.

I will be recommending this Watercolor Paper 9x12 Inch to family and friends.

These Dyvicl Hand Lettering Pens are nice for lettering. They come in a lot of sizes including a brush. The problem I have with them is that my pen worked for a while and then stopped. No ink, just nothing. I did use several of the pens but I was not happy that one dried up before I used it for more than a half-hour.

The pens come in several different sizes. They are good for hand lettering and would have been a great buy if one of the pens had not dried up. There are 12 pens in the set and I will try more of the others to see if they dry up like the first one. The second one I used was the brush and I will continue to use them.

I will not be recommending these Dyvicl Hand Lettering Pens to family and friends.

I have been wanting one of these Artists Wooden Manikin Blockhead for a while. I do have a small one but it does not move as well as this one. I have already started drawing different poses. I love it.

This jointed mannequin is just the right size to set on a table and draw what you see. The joints make it easy to pose in many different ways like walking, jogging, or just standing still waving. The possibilities are almost endless.

I will be recommending this Artists Wooden Manikin Blockhead to family and friends.

These Dyvicl Metallic Marker Pens have beautiful colors. I used almost all of them just checking them out. I can not wait to use them on some handmade cards.

The pens have an opaque finish. They do not have a bad odor like some pens. These pens can be used on light or dark surfaces.

I will be recommending these Dyvicl Metallic Marker Pens to family and friends.

These HIBOO Art Paintbrush Set-15 Different Sizes are really nice. I got them for one brush the 3/8 combo brush but I used more than just that brush. I didn't have any shedding although the instruction on the back said that might happen. I read somewhere that the 3/8 combo brush I wanted was good for grass and fur. I did try the grass and I think the fan brush would have worked just as good but I do think it is a better choice for fur.

This brush kit has 15 brushes. They are good quality brushes and there is a brush for many different painting needs. I was very happy with the variety and the quality.

I will be recommending these HIBOO Art Paintbrush Set-15 Different Sizes to family and friends.

This Wealike Resin Kit with Letter Silicone Molds was easy to use. I made two letters using the mold. I only used the pigment in both letters. I do plan to do more and use the other things. I wanted to see how much resin I need to mix before I used the other things. 10ml of both the resin and the harder with a few drops of pigment filled two complete letters with very little left in the cup. They have not finished curing yet so I can't say how well they did and how they come out of the mold. I will give an update as soon as they have cured.

The kit comes with everything to get started. There is an alphabet and numeric mold, cups 3 different types, the resin and hardener, two containers of foil flakes on silver, and one gold. It also comes with 5 pigments, white, black, yellow, blue, and red. The kit is full of things to use so I will not name them all but it is nice.

I will be recommending this Wealike Resin Kit with Letter Silicone Molds to family and friends.

These 12pcs Unfinished Wooden Circles are perfect for me. I am learning woodburning and I got these for that purpose. I also plan to use some with vinyl after I finish practicing woodburning.

The wood circles are 12 inches in diameter and they are smooth. I did not sand the wood before I started burning and I didn't see a problem with it. I will be putting some type of clear varnish or epoxy on it when I have one that I think will look great. 12 circles give me 24 tries if I use both sides.

I will be recommending these 12pcs Unfinished Wooden Circles to family and friends.

This HYWA Leather Cutters Paring Knive cuts great. I used it to cut a piece of the end of a larger piece of leather. I am new to leatherwork and I am no expert but this tool cuts leather easily. I was able to cut a small sample piece to work with and I will be using it more.

This leather cutter is very sharp. It has a nice handle and it was very comfortable in my hand. I will be using this leather cutter a lot more in the future.

I will be recommending this HYWA Leather Cutters Paring Knives to family and friends.

This Leather Craft Kits Leather Working Tools and Supplies has so many tools for working with leather. It will take me a while to find out how to use some of them. I am new to leatherwork and will be working hard to learn what every tool is for and how to use them. I did make a little sample piece using several of the tools as best as I could. They seemed a little dull to me but that may just be me.

The kit comes with 13 tools, some look the same but are different sizes. There is a box of razor blades, several file boards, and a chain with fasteners on each end. Although, I don't know what most of these things are called I plan to watch videos and learn

I will be recommending this Leather Craft Kits Leather Working Tools and Supplies to family and friends.

This ifergoo 92 Colors Polymer Clay Starter Kit was so disappointing for me. I was so excited to get this kit to start making things. I read the few instructions included and I watched a video about putting it in the oven. I did have concerns about putting it in my oven. So, I got out some clay, created something small just to text the clay. I preheated the oven, put it in the center of the oven on foil, and set the timer for the required time. It didn't harden, but it left a horrible odor in my house. I had the fan for my stove on and a window open.

The kit comes with three stackable, plastic containers filled with clay. It has tools and a mold. There is also a bag with jewelry-making supplies.

I will not be recommending this ifergoo 92 Colors Polymer Clay Starter Kit to family and friends.

This Wood Burning Kit 125PCS is great. I used to do this when I was younger and I forgot just how much I love it. I used one of the round wood pieces to make a Christmas ornament. It was so much fun that I will be getting a bigger piece of wood and burning an image of my husband's truck for him.

This kit has a huge amount of things. To start with it has a soldering iron with a button to adjust the heat. The set includes pieces for a hot knife blade. It has a huge amount of soldering iron tips and it has a few different sizes of wood burning tips. It comes with a stand to rest the iron when it is hot and you need to put it down. It also includes colored pencils, stencils, pliers, a brush, pencils, carbon paper, and wood pieces. The instructions are easy to follow and the wood pieces are just the right size to get started.

I will be recommending this Wood Burning Kit 125PCS to family and friends.

This MIRATUSO Acrylic Pouring Paint Set is gorgeous. I used it as an experiment with some stencils. Because it is very wet I thought it would work and it did. I had a little too much paint in places but that was a user error. I do plan to use it for some pouring art but I wanted to try it on the stencils first. I will be using it with more stencils in the future.

The set comes with 32 bottles of gorgeous color. They are each seal so you have to remove the cap to remove the seal. This paint is very wet and ready to pour.

I will be recommending this MIRATUSO Acrylic Pouring Paint Set to family and friends.

This GOTIDEAL Acrylic Paint Brush Set comes in 24 gorgeous colors. You will not need to do a lot of mixing with this set, because it has several shades of color. I used it to paint a tree. I used the different browns for the trunk and limbs. I used the different greens for the leaves. I could have mixed some of the colors but I wanted to work with just what I had, it didn't look too bad.

The set comes with artist-quality paint. It is a rich vibrant paint. It also comes with three brushes. I used them in a little sample painting and I loved it. I can't wait to use it in a full painting.

I will be recommending this GOTIDEAL Acrylic Paint Brush Set to family and friends.

This ZHY 1 Pair Silicone Lifesize Female Mannequin Foot Display will be perfect for my business. I make and sell handmade socks and jewelry. These feet will be just what I need to take pictures or to set up a booth and show off my creations.

The feet feel like gummy worms to me. Squishy! They have French manicure toenails that look very real. The size works for me too. I put a pair of my socks on them and they fit perfectly. I noticed in the description that it says they would be good for artists. I will have to give that a try too.

I will definitely be recommending this ZHY 1 Pair Silicone Lifesize Female Mannequin Foot Display to family and friends.

These 80 Colors Artist Alcohol Markers Dual Tips are of poor quality. I tried several different markers. One completely come apart and in one the ink was dry so the pen did not work. Those are just two out of 10 I tried. I did not use all 80 colors. The case is also poorly made. The pens want to come out of it because it has no stability.

I will not be recommending these 80 Colors Artist Alcohol Markers Dual Tips to family and friends.

This PANDAFLY Professional Drawing Sketching Pencil Set comes with 12 pencils. I am using them for a drawing I have been working on for a while. The reason I like them is that they go to a 14B. I work on truck drawings and things like tires need to be really dark. I may still have to use an Ebony pencil for some but I can get it pretty close with these pencils.

These graphite pencils do not have a scratchy core. I have used some pencils that scratched so much I had to stop using them. These pencils go on smoothly. They sharpen really well without have a lot of broken graphite. So far, these pencils are my new favorite.

I will be recommending this PANDAFLY Professional Drawing Sketching Pencil Set to family and friends.

This ARTIFY Acrylic Paint Set has 48 gorgeous colors. I used several of the colors in my small sample and I was happy with them. The paint blends well and covers fantastically. I was very happy with the colors I used.

The set comes with neon pink and neon carrot among the other 46 colors. They come in 1.29 fluid-ounce tubes and they have flip tops which I love. Each color is sealed so you need to take off the top and remove the little foil/plastic piece before using. The paint went onto the canvas smoothly and covered well. With this set mixing colors may not be as necessary as with some sets.

I will be recommending this ARTIFY Acrylic Paint Set to family and friends.

This Chalkola Paint Canvas Panels pack comes in 6 different sizes. I used a small size for my sample. The paint went on perfectly and the canvas did great. I added multiple layers of acrylic paint and the canvas stayed firm.

The canvas panels have been primed and are ready for painting. The variety of sizes was a plus for me. Before starting a big project you can do a portion on the smaller canvas to make a little sample or to work on something that could be a little more difficult. I love the variety and will be using more of them later.

I will be recommending these Chalkola Paint Canvas Panels to family and friends.

This Drawing Sketch Pencil Set is wonderful. I used them to work on a drawing I am doing. The pencils do not scratch when using them. I have used some that have a scratchy core. I had to stop using them, but I will be using these a lot. I love them.

The set of pencils come in a metal case for easy storage. There is also a sharpener and eraser included. This is a quality set of pencils.

I will be recommending this Drawing Sketch Pencil Set to family and friends.

These Mancola Artist Painting Canvas Panels are perfect for small paintings. I used acrylic on my test painting. I plan to use oil next. The panel worked well with my acrylic paint.

The panels are small but of good quality. The texture is nice and the paint went on smoothly. These are great for smaller paintings. Putting a few together for a larger painting would look great on the wall in sections.

I will be recommending these Mancola Artist Painting Canvas Panels to family and friends.

This GenCrafts 100% Cotton Watercolor Paper Pad worked perfectly. I used watercolor and it turned out well. I love the way the paint worked on the paper.

The paper is a heavy-weight, cold press. It is perfect for watercolor and acrylic. I will be using it to make handmade cards.

I will be recommending this GenCrafts 100% Cotton Watercolor Paper Pad to family and friends.

These TOYMIS 6Pcs Wooden Stencil Brushes work great. I had been wanting to do some things with stencils. Everything I tried before left me feeling disappointed. I am happy to say, with a smile. These brushes were a success.

The brushes come in different sizes. I only used two sizes, the smaller ones. I had tried the same stencil with many different methods of applying paint and these brushes are the only ones that worked well. The bristles are the secret, I believe. I watched a few videos and when I was excited when my project was successful.

I will be recommending these TOYMIS 6Pcs Wooden Stencil Brushes to family and friends.

These Pre Stretched Blank Canvas Boards for Painting are great. I love the different sizes. I used one of the small ones to try and I love them.

These canvases have been primed with several layers of gesso. They are ready for artists to start painting. I especially love the wedges included with the canvases.

I will be recommending these Pre Stretched Blank Canvas Boards for Painting to family and friends.

This Cheerlyhood Glitter Washi Tape Set is great. I used it on some greeting cards and it looks great. I love the glitter look and the colors.

The set comes with 8 pastel rolls. The glitter on the tape looks great without the mess. I have a couple of colors that are really close to the same color, like two shades of pink and two of blue. I was happy with the adhesion, it stuck to my card great.

I will be recommending this Cheerlyhood Glitter Washi Tape Set to family and friends.

These 5Pcs Rubber Carving Blocks with 12 Carving Tools do not include instructions. I had to watch several videos to try to learn to use this product. I am saddened to say mine did not look like it should have.

The kit is nice but would have loved to have instructions. My kit included 5 blocks to carve and a nice set of tools. I have no experience at all with this craft but I love trying new things. This set would not be for beginners due to the lack of instructions. Watching videos is good as a visual but the videos I watched didn't say anything about some of the tools that I have so I have no idea what to do with most of them.

I will not be recommending these 5Pcs Rubber Carving Blocks with 12 Carving Tools to family and friends.

This Permanent Vinyl Sheets, 50 Pieces has some gorgeous colors. I used it for some cards I needed to make and they turned out pretty nice. I think the adhesive is on the lower side as far as tackiness. I was able to remove it from my card when I placed it in the wrong place but it did stick well after I pressed (burnished) it.

The colors in this pack are wonderful. There is a color for almost anything you need a piece of vinyl for, including cards, which is what I used mine for. Weeding was extremely easy and transferring this vinyl was a breeze.

I will be recommending this Permanent Vinyl Sheets 50 Pieces to family and friends.

These Clear Stamps for Card Making 4 Sheets are nice. I like the sentiments but I do wish the flower stamps were a little more open. I love to color my stamps especially flowers but these flower stamps are too small or they have too much detail for a stamp.

The set comes with 4 sheets of acrylic stamps. The one with letters is nice because it gives you 3 of each letter, all a little different. I love the sentiments and butterfly sheet. The flowers and sentiment sheet, I talked about above, I was disappointed in this one. The last one looks like things for journaling.

I will be recommending these Clear Stamps for Card Making 4 Sheets to family and friends.

This 4 mil Blank Mylar Stencil works great. I bought it for something else but it did work well when I cut a small stencil to test. My favorite thing about this stencil is that it is clear.

The stencil cut fine on my small test. I have an idea in my head and I think this will work great for what I am needing. The fact that it is clear was a plus for me.

I will be recommending this 4 mil Blank Mylar Stencil to family and friends.

This Permanent Holographic Tree Texture Rose Gold Vinyl is absolutely gorgeous. I have a few ideas of how I am going to use it. I did do a small sample to make sure it did stick like it was supposed to. I did not have any problems.

This vinyl is textured and will look good on so many things. I don't think I will be putting it on the wall but I do have plans for my tablet cover, I'm just trying to decide what to cut out first! Other than my small sample.

I will be recommending this Permanent Holographic Tree Texture Rose Gold Vinyl to family and friends.

This HSJL Mini Heat Press Machine worked well. I used it to apply vinyl to the bag that was included with the machine. I was very happy with the results.

This machine is small but it does the job. It has three different temperature settings. I used high for my project. I got the adorable bear and I love it.

I will be recommending this HSJL Mini Heat Press Machine to family and friends.

These Ysarvest Art Pencils are great. The charcoal is not scratch like some charcoal I have used. I used it to draw a rose. I was able to blend it out for some areas and darken other areas. I love how they feel.

These charcoal pencils have a paint layer on them to keep your hands clean. I was able to draw thin lines and blend them out to create some highlights by going around the areas I wanted to be highlighted. Shadows are easy with these pencils. Them some in soft, medium, and hard.

I will be recommending this Ysarvest Art Pencil Woodless to family and friends.

This Natural Cotton Batting for Quilts is perfect for what I was needing. I am learning to quilt and I want to do a block at a time. This batting feels great and I can't wait to put my quilt together.

This batting looks great and it feels soft. The size is perfect for me too as I plan to sew one block at a time for a nice quilt to put at the end of a bed. I do believe it will make a warm lightweight quilt.

I will be recommending this Natural Cotton Batting for Quilts to family and friends.

This Norberg & Linden 9x12 Mixed Media Painting Watercolor Pad is very nice. I used watercolor and the paint did not seep through to the back. I used several layers and the paper stayed strong and didn't rip away with the last of the layer.

I love the texture of the paper, not too much or too little. I don't see that it would be good for sketching though. I love that you can paint on both sides if you care to.

I will be recommending this Norberg & Linden 9x12 Mixed Media Painting Watercolor Pad to family and friends.

This Acrylic Paint Set is very nice. The colors are great and I got a nice finished piece. The brushes come in all sizes and shapes, I didn't use all of them but the ones I did use were great. I did use the palette knife but so far I haven't used the sponge.

The set comes with 15 brushes, 24 tubes of acrylic paint, a palette knife, a sponge, and a zippered case. The paint is a heavy body and the colors are beautiful. I love the large brush and two or three others. I will be using all of them soon.

I will be recommending this Acrylic Paint Set to family and friends.

This Optical Drawing Board Sketch does great for tracing. The thing I did not like about it was the app. The app wanted permission to make calls on my phone! I don't know why this is needed to trace something. For this reason, I did not give 5 stars. It also says you have to activate it to use it more than 10 times.

The drawing board was easy to assemble, but to begin with, I had a little trouble using it because I am left-handed. I did figure out that I needed to turn everything thing around a flip the image. Instructions would have been nice and would have saved me a little time. The app itself took a little bit of time to understand even though there is a tutorial.

I will not be recommending this Optical Drawing Board Sketch, because the app wanted permission to make calls on my phone.

These MISULOVE Metallic Gel Pens are beautiful. I will be using them for my handmade cards. The colors are bold and look great on my cards.

The gel pen pack has 2 colors, 3 gold, and 3 silver. They look great on my cards which are white, but they would look great on any color because the colors are bold. The ink flows well from the pen so I got a perfect line every time.

I will be recommending these MISULOVE Metallic Gel Pens to family and friends.

This Arteza Mixed Media Paper Foldable Canvas Pad works great. I used watercolor on mine and it did warp a little but not enough to distract from the painting. The frame part was a little bit frustrating in the beginning but I figured it out.

The paper comes in a pad so you are tearing the paper from the pad. The paper did hold up well with watercolor with only a little warping. The frame has picture instructions. I finally got mine to work and it looks great.

I will be recommending this Arteza Mixed Media Paper Foldable Canvas Pad to family and friends.

This Nicpro Watercolor Paint Kit has beautiful colors. I used them to create a small background for making handmade cards. I used a few of the colors and was very happy with the result. I will be using this a lot more.

The kit comes with a water brush, a set of brushes, watercolor paper, and 48 watercolor cakes. It is a perfect starter set. The paints also come in a nice box with a clear top so you can see all of the colors.

I will be recommending this Nicpro Watercolor Paint Kit to family and friends.

This Sethruki Watercolor Paint Set was very disappointing for me. When I opened the pack it was nasty. There was something on it like fur from a cat or dog. After cleaning all of that off, I used the paint. The first thing I noticed when I started painting was the red was not red. It was more hot pink than red.

The painting set included two water brushes. First, the barrel of the brush is short. Second, the bristles of the brush went up into the section that holds it. Third as stated above the colors are not great. I was very disappointed with this painting set.

I will not be recommending this Sethruki Watercolor Paint Set to family and friends.

This Dyvicl Glitter Metallic Watercolor Set has gorgeous colors. I used them for two small backgrounds. The colors are very light so it gives an appealing background to add stamps, stencils, or small drawings over the top of it.

The watercolors look very bright in the box. I was a little disappointed that they were not as bright on paper as they were in the box. When the work dried, however, I was happy with the result. The shine of the metallic paint gives it an extra boost of visual appeal. The pastel look of my backgrounds gave me a few ideas of how these would work in many different projects.

I will be recommending this Dyvicl Glitter Metallic Watercolor Set to family and friends.

This Leda Art Supply Cold Pressed Watercolor Pad works well for my needs. I painted 4 small backgrounds with two different paints. The paper did great. It held several washes of watercolor and it didn't bleed through. The bend in the paper was minimal.

The watercolor paper is 140 pounds and it is great. I love the texture in this paper, it gave one set of watercolor I used as backgrounds a little extra appeal. I am very happy with the results of using this paper.

I will be recommending this Leda Art Supply Cold Pressed Watercolor Pad to family and friends.

This IModeur Adhesive Vinyl Roll – Glossy White Permanent Vinyl Rolls worked great. I used it for an intricate piece, an egg shape with flowers in it. I was very happy with the results.

The vinyl is of good quality. The description says glossy white. It is glossy but I would have to call the color off white or pale gray. The color didn't make any difference to me for the project I was doing but it might to some.

I will be recommending this IModeur Adhesive Vinyl Roll – Glossy White Permanent Vinyl Rolls to family and friends.

These Transparent Sticky Back Thin Clear Dots work great. I will be using them for cards that I hand deliver or put into packages. I plan to put them on my homemade envelopes so the recipient will not have to rip the envelope if they want to keep it.

The size of the dots, 10mm is perfect for me. They have sticky backs so they will stick to my envelopes easily. The hook and loop will make opening my envelopes easy for the recipients. I love these dots.

I will be recommending these Transparent Sticky Back Thin Clear Dots to family and friends.

These Acrylic Paint Pens will make a perfect addition to my handmade holiday cards. They will work as Christmas colors or as Anniversary colors. I love the bold color.

The paint pens are easy to use. I did as the box instructed, shook well, and push down the tip until the paint gets to the end. They write perfectly and I love the colors.

I will be recommending these Acrylic Paint Pens to family and friends.

This Artisto Watercolor Pads worked well. I used watercolor and pens to create a small card front. I am happy with the quality of the paper.

The watercolor paper is a good quality paper. My paint did not bleed through the paper which is a plus for me. The finished piece will make a beautiful front to my handmade cards.

I will be recommending Artisto Watercolor Pads to family and friends.

This Oil Paint Brush Cleaner Soap is really nice. It cleaned my brushes easily. I used it for acrylic paint and was happy to see how easy it was to get my brushes clean.

The soap didn't have instructions. I just put a little water on my fingertips to get the soap wet before washing my brushes. I put my brush bristles right into the container and rubbed gently on the soap then rinsed.

I will be recommending this Oil Paint Brush Cleaner Soap to family and friends.

These Double Line Outline Metallic Marker Pens are not what I expected. I didn't expect the color in the center, although I guess I should have. I got these to use for my card making but I am not sure if they are going to work. I had planned to use them for block lettering but that doesn't look good. I will keep working with them to get a good look.

The ink of the markers dries fast. The smell is a little overpowering for me. They are easy to use and but they do bleed through on my cardstock. I can work around that though.

I will be recommending these Double Line Outline Metallic Marker Pens to family and friends.

This MUJINHUA Professional Colour Charcoal Pencils Drawing Set is very nice. I used them to draw two apples on a table. My drawing is not the greatest but I loved these colored charcoal pencils. I will be practicing more with the color. I have only used black charcoal to draw but I love the color.

These pencils come in hard, medium, and soft charcoal. There are 4 colors and they work wonderfully together. I love the quality of this charcoal.

I will be recommending this MUJINHUA Professional Colour Charcoal Pencils Drawing Set to family and friends.

These Vinyl Weeding Tools for Vinyl Crafts are nice. I do not like the Jaw vinyl cutter. It may take a little experience to get it to cut right but I could not get it to cut the way I wanted it to. I do live the squeegee and both of the tweezers. The weeding tool is nice. So far it is working well for me.

This set does have information on the back to describe each piece in the set. There are also instructions on changing the blades in the Jaw vinyl cutter. I found this to be a plus since I have never used one and would not have known how to change the blade.

I will be recommending these Vinyl Weeding Tools for Vinyl Crafts to family and friends.

These MUJINHUA Precision Micro-Line Pens are perfect for drawing. They are great when using stencils because you can get into really small areas. They are great for freehand too. I use them for both.

The nib of the pens ranges from 005 to 20. I use the 005 more than the 20 but I could use the 20 for calligraphy. These pens work well with alcohol markers with no bleeding. I did not try watercolor yet but if the markers didn't bleed I don't believe they would with watercolor. If it does I will revise.

I will be recommending these MUJINHUA Precision Micro-Line Pens to family and friends.

This Alcohol Ink Set has the most beautiful vibrant colors. I used grass green and peacock blue for a pair of earrings. I used silver finding but I think I will change those to bring out the beautiful colors more. There are so many beautiful colors the hard part was choosing the colors for my project.

The ink set comes with 20 small bottles of ink. When you open the bottle there is a fine tip for dispensing the ink. It didn't take a lot of ink for the beautiful earrings I made. I will be making more and trying all of the colors.

I will be recommending this Alcohol Ink Set to family and friends.

These 12 Rolls Plant Washi Tapes Set are just beautiful. I ordered this tape to add to handmade cards. I am making Spring cards to give to family and friends and this tape was a perfect addition to my cards. There are also some beautiful leaf cutouts that I haven't used yet but will be now that I have them.

Half of the tape has a green or greenish background with flowers, leaves, an argyle pattern, and more. The other half has a whitish background with different floral patterns. They are both beautiful and look great on my cards. I do add a bit of glue to my washi tape to ensure it will last. I probably don't need to but that is just the way I do it.

I will be recommending this 12 Rolls Plant Washi Tapes Set to family and friends.

These 24 Pieces DIY Candle Tins are beautiful. I ordered them for candle making but they are so beautiful I haven't decided if that is what I am going to do with them. I have almost decided to use them for storing small beads and small paper cutouts.

These tins are so beautiful and well made. The lids fit snuggly making it a perfect way to store small items. I am a crafter and these tins will be a great addition to my crafting supplies.

I will be recommending these 24 Pieces DIY Candle Tins to family and friends.

These MUJINHUA Black Micro-Pen Fineliner Ink Pens worked perfectly for my two projects. In the first project, I used the smallest pen to track a stencil. I used alcohol markers to see if the ink would bleed. It did not bleed at all. In the second project, I used the smallest pen to outline a rose and some leaves. I used watercolor for the rose and leaves. The ink did not bleed at all.

These pens are perfect for all of my different craft needs. I like a good small line pen for outlining a few of my paintings or drawings. This set of pens has that and more. The sizes range from 0.05mm, which is what I used most, to a brush, which I will be using later. These are fantastic pens if you do multiple crafts as I do.

I will be recommending these MUJINHUA Black Micro-Pen Fineliner Ink Pens to family and friends.

This Round-Pointed Professional Artists Paint Brush Set 12 worked great for my painting. Other brushes have that one or two little bristles that mess up my painting when I need to get into smaller places. These brushes did not do that. I was able to get around the edges of my painting without causing little marks from the bristles of the brush.

The bristles are made of nylon and for me, they worked better than most I have tried. The watercolor went on the canvas nicely and evenly. The bushes cleaned up easily. These are great brushes.

I will be recommending this Round-Pointed Professional Artists Paint Brush Set 12 to family and friends.

This Leda Art Supply Mixed-Media worked great. I used pen and alcohol markers first, the markers bled through but the paper didn't bow or bend. I next tried watercolor, I was impressed. Every paper I used for watercolor has bowed and looked terrible but not this paper.

The paper is slightly textured which was perfect for my two creations. I did tear out the page to prevent the other pages from being unusable, which worked out since the markers bled through. I didn't try graphite or acrylics this time but I will be trying both in the future.

I will be recommending this Leda Art Supply Mixed-Media to family and friends.

This MUJINHUA Professional Charcoal Pencils Drawing Set is very nice. I chose to draw a bird. The charcoal pencils were great for this I was able to blend with no problem. Some charcoal I have used has scratchy places in them but these did not.

The pencils are of good quality. I like have the soft, medium and hard pencils for blending, highlights, and shading. I started out using charcoal as a young girl and it has come a long way since then.

I will be recommending this MUJINHUA Professional Charcoal Pencils Drawing Set to family and friends.

These Arteza Everblend Ultra Art Markers work perfectly for my cardmaking needs. I enjoy putting just the right color on my card and with these pens, I have many choices for the main color, shadow, and highlight. The colors are so beautiful and vibrant.

These markers work well with my ink. It doesn't cause it to smudge or look dull. I love all the possibilities this pack of pens give me. It was a little more than I wanted to pay but well worth the cost.

I will be recommending these Arteza Everblend Ultra Art Markers to family and friends.

This Rancco 18 Pcs Rubber Stamp set is perfect for me. I have many things going on and sometimes it is hard to keep up. This stamp set will help me stay better organized and keep up with dates I need to have something finished.

The stamps are made well. I got a good, clean finished little calendar stamp for one of my projects. This will be great for scheduling my projects from start to finish. It will also be helpful when journaling. There are several stamps and probably something for everyone that's looking for a way to organize their lives.

I will be recommending this Rancco 18 Pcs Rubber Stamp set to family and friends.

This L7 Mannequin Female is perfect for me. I make hats, scarves, jewelry, and more. This will be great for displaying them. My favorite thing about this mannequin is that it has little holes in the ears for earrings. I have been looking for this for a while now and didn't even realize that there were holes until I received it. It made my day!

The mannequin looks great. It is very sturdy and will look great as a display at craft shows. I have another one that isn't as well made so I am very happy with this one.

I will be recommending this L7 Mannequin Female to family, friends, or anybody that asks about it.

This Monicut Cutting Mat for Cricut Maker works well. It is a little stickier than the other name brand mats. The cost of these mats is great.

My cutouts stuck to the mat but I was able to get them off with a little extra work. The size was the same as the name brand mat. I will be ordering more of these mats.

I have recommended this Monicut Cutting Mat for Cricut Maker to family and friends.

This VOSDANS Travel Sewing Machine Bag with a Cover is perfect for my sewing machine. The cover is nice but the bag is great. The bottom has a removable piece for easy storage. There are pockets for the extras.

My sewing machine sometimes sits without use for a while and the cover will be great for keeping dust off of it. The bag is great for taking it to be repaired or to a family member's home for sewing nights. The quality of both the bag and the cover is extraordinary.

I will be recommending this VOSDANS Travel Sewing Machine Bag with a Cover to family and friends.

This PUREFORET We Make Candle Kit is a perfect starter kit. I wanted to start making candles but I didn't know what all I needed. This kit comes with everything, even a thermometer!

I started with the yellow cube to add color to my candle and grapefruit for the scent. The candle turned out perfect and the grapefruit smell was not overpowering but gave a hint of citrus to my kitchen.

I will definitely be recommending PUREFORET We Make Candle Kit to family and friends.

This Bianyo Mixed Media Paper Pad is thick and holds its shape with watercolor paints better than some I have used. It does bow some but not as much. I love that it is perforated making it easier to remove a page.

I was making a Valentine's Day Card and I didn't want it to look like everybody else's so I removed a piece of this mixed media paper, cut it down to size, and started painting. The paint went on great, it didn't stay flat but it wasn't too bent out of shape like some. I'm eager to try graphite and acrylics next. LOVE this paper.

I will definitely be recommending this Bianyo Mixed Media Paper Pad to family and friends.

These 310 Pcs Candle Making Supplies are perfect for making soy candles. There are 3 different size wicks so you don't have to waste a lot of the wick when making tea light candles. It also comes with plenty of glue dots.

I think these wicks may burn a little hotter than the other wicks I was using. I did get a little more smoke than I did with the other wicks. I am thinking I didn't cut the wick short enough but I will try that the next time.

I will be recommending these 310 Pcs Candle Making Supplies to family and friends.

This Candle Making Kit for Adults comes as a complete set. You get the soy wax, the jug to melt the wax, the jars to fill with the wax, glue dots, wicks, and more. There are instructions but they are minimal.

My first problem was how to get the glue off the stickers. When I finally got it off, I didn't have a problem with the others, an explanation of what I should do would have been a time saver. Next, the measurements are in grams. I do have a scale that measures grams but it doesn't go that high. I used a converter and poured my soy wax into the candle jug. There are no instructions for this part only a picture of the jug in a pan on the stove. Following the picture, I preceded to do just as instructed. Where the handle of my candle jug began to MELT. I caught it in time to keep from getting all over my stove but that was not expected.

So given my experience with this particular candle-making kit, I will not be recommending Candle Making Kit for Adults to family and friends. It is a potential fire hazard.

These Hero Arts CLEAR STMP BUGS are just too cute. I love the way they look and the variety of the pack. The stamps peel off easily and go back on easily.

I have put up a little sample to show how cute they are. I stamped them in black and then used gel pens to color them. there was plenty of room for the nib of the marker to get in those small places. I also want to mention how easy it was to clean my little ladybug stamp. I love these stamps!

I will be recommending these stamps to family and friends.

This White Liquid Chalk Markers for Blackboard is bright and bold. The look is nothing like regular chalk. The different tip sizes give all kinds of ways to use them.

I attached the smallest marker to a blackboard I have for a list of grocery items. It goes on great and it is very bright not dull like regular chalk. I also used it on a mirror to see how well it worked on the glass. The marker on the blackboard took a little water and firm pressure getting it off, but it did come off. For the marker on the glass, I sprayed a little window cleaner on it and it smeared but it did come off. It didn't leave anything so I will be using it on my doors and window during the holidays.

I will definitely be recommending these White Liquid Chalk Markers for Blackboard to family and friends.

These Fabric Markers Art Pens Permanent have beautiful colors. The colors are vibrant and look great on a tee shirt. I didn't use the included stencils this time but plan to use them later.

I used my markers to brighten up a favorite tee shirt. I have a tee-shirt that was losing its color it had faded in places that made it very unappealing but I used these markers with the color closest to the one on my tee-shirt to give it new life. I used a steam iron to set the color, then washed it. It did not bleed and it did not fade. If it fades after washing several times I will be back to revise.

I will be recommending these Fabric Markers Art Pens Permanent to family and friends.

This ANMUXI 5D Diamond Painting Kit has square drills. I don't particularly like the square drills and I wish I had read the description better. The canvas is very sticky. Edited: The number of drills to finish the painting was insufficient. I did use another color but I am not happy to come up short on the correct color.

I love the picture of this painting. The symbols are hard to read. I will be putting it on my lightboard but not sure if that will help much. I don't really like symbols on diamond paintings. I prefer numbers and letters.

I will not be recommending this ANMUXI 5D Diamond Painting Kit to family and friends.

This DIY 5D Diamond Painting Kits for Adults is beautiful. The canvas is sticky so I didn't have a problem with the beads. The pattern is easy to read.

I love the picture it is beautiful. The legend has numbers and letters which I like better than symbols. Another thing I love about this diamond painting is that in the legend when the pattern number is a 1 the number of the bead is also 1. I do not like the ones that have the number on the canvas as 1 but the bead number is 4. The only thing that keeps me from giving a 5 star is that the paper over the canvas was very hard to remove.

I will be recommending this DIY 5D Diamond Painting Kits for Adults to family and friends.

This Diamond Painting Kit for Adults has all the usual items included. The canvas is very sticky and so far I am happy with it. I will revise if that changes. The quality of the canvas and the drills are good. No complaints yet, if I do I will revise.

I love this American Flag Rose diamond painting. It is absolutely beautiful. The lower half of the painting is a little harder to read because it is dark. I am using a lightboard to help me see the symbols easier.

I will be recommending this Diamond Painting Kit for Adults to family and friends.

These Multipurpose Sewing Clips with Tin Box are perfect for crafters. They are sturdy and come in different sizes and colors. A must-have for your craft toolbox.

I will be using these clips for more than one craft. I knit and when I am sewing sides or sleeves together I always need something to hold them in place so I don't have one side longer than the other. I also make jewelry and sometimes I need something to hold the piece in place while I work. Great for wirework or chainmail.

I will be recommending these Multipurpose Sewing Clips with Tin Box to family and friends.

This OBSEDE 33 Feet Necklace Chain for Jewelry Making will be great for making necklaces, bracelets, or even earrings. The necklace chain is strong. I was surprised! It didn't look like a good quality chain but it is solid and has a little twist in it making it look more elegant.

The set includes a roll of chain, lobster claws, and jumprings. The only problem I have with the set is the jumprings. They are not cut well and they overlap at the opening. I have other jumprings but some people may not so this would cause problems for new jewelry makers. If not for the jumprings I would have given this set a 5-star rating.

I will recommend this OBSEDE 33 Feet Necklace Chain for Jewelry Making to family and friends with the added tip to buy their own jumprings.

This Gouache Paint Set has beautiful colors. It does not cover well. I used a stretched primed canvas and the color did not have a smooth look to it. I did not use anything put paint and was disappointed to find how bad it went onto the canvas.

The kit includes 32 tubes of beautiful paint, a pallet, and a brush. It would be a good gift for children but not for adults. If you are wanting to learn to paint I would not start with this set. It will be frustrating and defeat the purpose of painting.

I will not be recommending this Gouache Paint Set to family and friends.

This DIY Paint by Numbers Canvas Oil Painting Kit has a really nice canvas that is folded. The problem I have with this is that there are no instructions on how to get the creases out of the canvas. I put it on a flat surface and put a few books on it to try to flatten it. I tried an iron, I watch a video for this. Nothing worked. This is very frustrating.

My kit comes with a canvas that is folded, several tubs of paint, brushes, things to hang the painting (with no instructions on how to use these items), and painting instruction on the box. The numbers are easy to read although some of them are really small. The paint goes on easily and covers pretty well.

I like this kit but unless I am asked I will not be recommending this DIY Paint by Numbers Canvas Oil Painting Kit to family and friends.

This Scratch & Sketch Art Paper has been more fun than the larger piece I tried. The more I do the more I love it.
I will have to do a bigger one next to see if I love it as much as this smaller one now that I am addicted!

My kit included 8 scratch cards, 1 pen, 1 scraper, 1 brush, 2 wooden sticks, repair fluid, and a really nice tool bag.
I don't care much for the wooden sticks and I have not used the repair fluid. I love the pen and the brush, I am okay with the scraper but I don't like it as much as the pen. When I first tried this type of art I did not like it much. I have been working on the one with the umbrella and I hate having to stop working on it.

I will be recommending this Scratch & Sketch Art Paper to family and friends.

This ANMUXI 5D Diamond Painting Kit is frustrating. It has symbols that are so close to each other it is hard for me to tell which is which at times. The painting has two arrows one up and one to the left. I have to keep looking to see which one I am doing. This is my first painting with square drills, so far I am not impressed. Edited: I don't know if it is the square drills but they don't stick very well. I ran out of drills in two different colors.

My kit contains a 12" X 12" sticky canvas, 35 different colors of drills, two trays with funnel ends, 2 pens, 3 different drill heads, a large piece of wax, a pair of tweezers, and some plastic bags. So far the canvas seems to be very sticky (Edited: I don't know if it is the square drills but there were places where the drills didn't stick well at all). I will revise my review if that changes. I have been doing the round drills and as of right now I like them better than this square drill painting, though that might change by the time I finish the painting. I am less than a third of the way but I am not enjoying this one as much as the others.

I will not be recommending this ANMUXI 5D Diamond Painting Kits to family and friends.

This Ginkko Paint by Numbers for Adults Kids Beginners with Wooden Frame is very nice. I like the stretched canvas frame. The paint goes on smoothly. The numbers are easy to read.

My kit comes with a stretched framed canvas, 8 little tubs of paint, 3 brushes, and some things to hang the painting but there is no instruction on how to do that. There are some instructions on the back of the box on how to make colors transparent or more pastel. The painting itself is pretty self-explanatory. The easily read numbers on the canvas match the number on the paint lids. The different size brushes are great for large or small sections of the painting. One gaff in the instructions reads "Make sure the lid is off when you don't use it". I am pretty sure that is not what they meant to say as the paint would dry up and not be usable if you did that. Instructions on how to use the hanging materials would be helpful!

I have recommended this Ginkko Paint by Numbers for Adults Kids Beginners with Wooden Frame to family and friends.

This STALENTE DIY 5D Diamond Painting Kits for Adults is absolutely beautiful. The colors are vibrant and the painting itself is stunning. I love the butterflies and the daisies. So far, the back seems really sticky and the drills are sticking well. If that changes I will be back to edit my review.

My kit included on beautiful, sticky canvas, 24 gorgeous colors of individually packaged drills/diamonds, a tray, a pen, and one wax glue. The drills/diamonds are round and seem to be mostly the same size. I did get a little trash (small pieces) but not as much as I have in other paintings.

I will be recommending this STALENTE DIY 5D Diamond Painting Kits for Adults to family and friends.

This Faber-Castell Paint by Number Watercolor Bold Floral is not like the paint by number paintings I did as a child. The colors in this painting are beautiful. I love the framed stretched canvas.

My paint by numbers kit included a stretched canvas on a wooden frame. There were a set of paints and one brush. A few things I didn't like was there was only one brush. The brush is too small for the larger areas and too large for the smaller areas. More than one brush size would have been great. The next thing I didn't care for was the way the paints were numbered. You had to look at the top of the paper every time for the color number. I put the color number on the appropriate color with a sharpie. That made it easier to work with. My review will be 3 stars because of these two things but the painting itself is fun and beautiful.

I have already recommended this Faber-Castell Paint by Number Watercolor Bold Floral to family and friends.

These 4 Pack 5D Diamond Painting by Number Kits are really fun. They are not too big and the colors are vibrant. The drills/diamonds stick really well to the canvas.

My package included 4 diamond painting canvases. Each one containing the drills, a sticky pen, an adhesive clay, and a diamond plate. The package also includes 2 extra pens with multiple diamond pens on one end and flat scrapers on the other end. There are also 100 little baggies.

I have already recommended these 4 Pack 5D Diamond Painting by Number Kits to family and friends.

This YANXIN DIY Paint by Numbers Adults was somewhat of a disappointment. The canvas was folded to fit into a small box. There no instructions on how to remove the creases the folds made. I did watch a video that said to use an iron. I did but it didn't work for me.

The kit includes one folded canvas, 24 small tubs of paint, 3 brushes, some hooks with no instructions on how to use them, and a very small picture of what your painting should look like. The paint goes on smoothly but I had to put extra coats on some of the colors. Not impressed.

I will not be recommending this YANXIN DIY Paint by Numbers Adults to family and friends.

This Christmas Day Decoration Round Full Drill is beautiful. The drill colors are vibrant but there are several wrong colors in some of the bags. The background seems to be very sticky compared to some others.

The package comes with a beautiful Christmas canvas which as I said before seems to be very sticky. I will be back to edit if that changes. I have not finished yet. There are 23 sealed bags of drills/ diamonds, a tray, a pen, and the sticky wax. I am loving it so far and if nothing changes I will be very happy.

I have recommended this Christmas Day Decoration Round Full Drill to family and friends.

This Scratch Art Rainbow Painting Paper is different. I can't say that I love it because of all the scraped off bits but I have just started. I had never even heard of this type of art before and I wanted to give it a try. The colors are gorgeous and I can't want to finish it. I started with Holland.

My kit included 3 drawing boards to scratch off. Tools in which I am not sure what they are called or which ones I was supposed to use. There were no instructions telling me which tools to use just a comment about the wooden ones. There was some ink looking stuff that leaked out and got all over the wooden stylus, which looked really nasty.

I will let people know about this scratch-off art but I will not necessarily recommend it.

This Christmas DIY 5D Diamond Painting Kit is a lot of fun. It has beautiful colors and I love the Christmas theme. The diamonds are (so far) sticking to the canvas. I am not getting any diamonds coming off of the canvas, which can be very frustrating. I am finding this diamond painting relaxing.

The kit comes with the canvas, 23 packs of colorful diamonds, a tray, a sticky pen, and the glue. I did find a few different colors had some stray diamonds in them but the colors were very obvious. The canvas (so far) is very sticky and the symbols are easy to read. There are two charts (drill tables) on the canvas. One on the top left and one on the bottom right.

I have already recommended this Christmas DIY 5D Diamond Painting Kit to family and friends. It is so much fun!

This Watercolor Detail Paint Brushes Set is beautiful. The first brush I used had frustrating hair/bristles at the base that would not go back into place. I ended up having to trim them because they got little dots of paint on my paper in places I did not want paint. The next frustrating problem was the ends of the brushes or the tips of the brushes, if I tried to get close to the edge of the flower I was painting it didn't seem to have paint but the minute I got a little closer with the tip the paint would go past the section I was trying to fill. I will probably have to trim the tips too. I did like the variety and sizes of brushes.

The brush set comes with 12 brushes made of premium synthetic hair. Included are 1 oval brush, 2 flat brushes, 8 round brushes, and one liner brush. I don't know what was put on them before shipping but the first one I used had something black on it. It could have been a dye or something but I wish I had known that before starting my painting. It added some unwanted gray to my color.

I will not be recommending these brushes to family and friends.

This Phoenix Artist Grade Watercolor Paint Set has a beautiful pigment. It went onto the paper smoothly. I love the color selections so I didn't have to mix a lot of the colors because they were already there.

The Set comes with 24 colors with a white, 3 colors of yellow, an orange, 4 colors of red, a violet, 5 colors of blue, 3 colors of green, and a few more colors. Each tube has .27 fluid ounces. Paintings are almost limitless as there are so many colors plus you can combine them for even more colors.

I will be recommending this Phoenix Artist Grade Watercolor Paint Set to family and friends.

The best thing about this AUTOTOOLHOME 45mm Rotary Cutter Set is the blades. I love that you get replaceable blades with the tool. The next thing I like is the handle, which was very comfortable to hold on to and use.

The rotary cutter set comes with the cutter and 9 blades. It has three kinds of blades, 5 rotary blades for cutting straight lines, 2 rotary blades for cutting curves, and 2 rotary blades for cutting dotted lines. The blades are very sharp. I cut through a double layer of denim like it was nothing. I like that you can tell that the "safety mode". I have had trouble determining this with some other rotary blades. According to the back of the package, it will cut paper, leather, and fabric. I will have to try the dotted lines on paper, that one sounds interesting to me.

I will be recommending this AUTOTOOLHOME 45mm Rotary Cutter Set to family and friends.

This RISEBRITE Acrylic Paint Set with Canvas is a great gift for beginners both adults and children. It has everything needed to get started. The box says for age 5+.

The kit comes with 25 pieces. It has a wooden easel, a mixing pallet, 4 canvas panels, 7 brushes, and 12 tubes of acrylic paint. The paint seems to be a pretty good quality better than some I have got in kits. I really like the brushes, they didn't shed during painting like some I have used. The canvas panels are 8X10 which is a good size to start painting.

I will be recommending this RISEBRITE Acrylic Paint Set with Canvas to family and friends.

These yazi Paint Canvas Assorted Sizes are pre-primed with three layers of Gesso. The paint didn't go on as smoothly as I thought it should but it could have been the paint. I will try different paint the next time to see if it works better.

This is a 12-Multi-Pack of stretched boards. There are 3 of each size and there are 4 sizes. The paper on the package says that they are 100% cotton and acid-free. These canvases will make a great gift for anybody wanting to start painting.

I will be recommending these yazi Paint Canvas Assorted Sizes to family and friends.

These Dylviw 9 Pieces Fine Tip Detail Painting Brushes are just right for small detail work. I love the different sizes in brush length and in thickness. These would make a great gift for painters wanting to do more detail.

There are 9 brushes in the set from size 000 to 6. The actual brushes vary in length and width giving this set a variety of uses. One of the things I love is the triangle handles of the brushes making them easier to grip and use.

I will be recommending these Dylviw 9 Pieces Fine Tip Detail Painting Brushes to family and friends.

I wanted this A3 LED Light Box to learn to do calligraphy. I am currently using it to do a 5D diamond painting. It works wonderfully. It would also be great for doing cross-stitch on dark material.

This lightbox is approximately 11 X 16 inches and it is lightweight. It comes with a USB cord, I plug mine into a connection at the base of a light on my drawing table. The light is very bright but there is not a dimmer although it is advertised as having a dimmable function. I do think it can be upgraded but I am not certain about that.

I will be recommending thisA3 LED Light Box to family and friends but I will be letting them know they may have to purchase an upgrade if they want the dimmable function.

I do different kinds of craft projects and sometimes I make a mess. These Mlife Silicone Mats for Resin Crafts are perfect for my crafting needs. I use glue guns and soldering irons and I really need something to keep my workspace looking good.

My pack included a blue, green, and clear mat. I have used the clear mat for painting. I hate getting paint on my work surface and usually try to find something to keep paint from getting everywhere. This mat was perfect for the job and it cleaned up well. I haven't used it with the soldering iron or the glue gun yet but if it doesn't do the job I will be back to edit this review.

I also make jewelry and I think the green or blue mat will work well for that. They don't seem as slick as the clear mat. Of course, I will be using it for resin jewelry as well.

I will be recommending this Mlife Silicone Mat for Resin Craft to family and friends.

I had my doubts about this Sugru I000941 Moldable Multi-Purpose Glue but I shouldn't have. I have a lever that broke a while back and needed a hook for it. The moldable glue was perfect for the job.

The box had three pieces with three different colors. My box has white, gray, and black. I used the black one because that matched the color of the lever that broke. I put it on the lever and molded it into a sort of hook. I left it overnight and the next morning it was still a little soft, but later that day it felt a little more firm. Now it feels like hard plastic just like the lever. NOTE: I used this very late at night, after midnight so the next morning wasn't like it was used early the day before.

I will be recommending this Sugru I000941 Moldable Multi-Purpose Glue to family and friends. I am looking for other things to use my two other pieces.

This Watercolor Paint Palette is great for mixing paint. There are 11 small wells and one large well for paint. Mixing paint is easy because there are 5 different size sections to mix the color needed for the painting.

This oval-shaped palette is lightweight and the thumb hole makes it easy to hold while mixing and actually painting. The cleanup was very easy and it didn't leave a stain on the first use. I have others that stained the first time I used them.

I will be recommending this Watercolor Paint Palette to family and friends.

This AmazonBasics Art Paint Brushes Set is really nice. It comes in a lot of sizes from small round and filbert brushes to wide brushes for covering a canvas.

These brushes held paint good and didn't leave streaks for pieces of the brush on my painting. They are very lightweight and cleaned up fairly good considering they are white. I used acrylic paint and really loved the feel of the brush with the paint.

I will be recommending this AmazonBasics Art Paint Brushes Set to family and friends.

This Conicare Resin Jewelry Making Kit is good for beginners. It has almost everything you need to start but the resin. It also has instructions.

The kit includes, as I said, instructions on what materials you need of which most are in this kit. It gives you step by step instructions on preparing your resin for the molds. There are also instructions on using the molds included in this kit.

The kit also includes some really cute molds for making jewelry. The molds have shapes like a leaf, star, moon, heart, circles, ovals, teardrop, square, rectangle, diamond, puzzle piece, and 5 separate pieces. You also get 2 thick rubber containers, some string sticks, ear wires, two sizes of jumprings, keyrings, and lanyards. There is also a paper giving you 10% off your next order. If you have wanted to try resin jewelry, this kit is for you.

I will be recommending this kit to family and friends.

These Betionol Diamond Painting Tools are the perfect gift for people who love or want to get into diamond painting. It is good for beginners and advanced diamond painters. This tool kit will help you stay organized and depending on your skill level it will help you finish faster.

The kit comes in a cute zipper pouch. It has a storage box in little boxes inside with blank labels. The little boxes are connected four in a row with 7 rows giving you 28 little boxes to store your diamonds. There are three trays one small with a little spout to pour back into the storage containers, a medium tray with a larger spout, and one larger tray with tweezers sitting in a little slot to the back of the tray. There are several little plastic bags for storing your diamonds also. You get multiple sticky pens, for one or more than one diamond placing. You get the sticky was in little squares and hearts. A fixing tool, two clips, and a small plastic spoon.

I will be recommending this Betionol Diamond Painting Tools to family and friends.

This Needle Felting Kit comes with everything needed to start felting. It would be a good gift for your crafty friends. It also includes a card with a website for a tutorial.

The wool is beautiful and the colors vibrant. The best thing in the kit is the finger cot. I have stuck my finger many times and this will be a finger saver. The smaller pieces are secure in a cute little plastic case. The kit is packaged well. The molds are of flowers, leaves, dogs, cats, paw prints, bones, butterflies, birds, hearts, moon, stars, and clouds. The one thing I did not like was that the pictures with the QR Code for the tutorial are not the picture on the website. Those pictures belong to someone else. Which is theft, those pictures are the work of other people. They took their time to create the cute little items and take just the right pictures and this person took those as their own. Not acceptable. There are two tutorials on the website, one of a giraffe and one of some little birds that should have been on the paper instead of someone else's work.

I will not be recommending this Needle Felting Kit to family and friends because of the theft of property.

These CeleMoon 48 Colors Alcohol Based Marker Pens have a variety of colors with dual tips. The colors are vibrant and the ink flows smoothly. These will be perfect for card making or scrapbooking to add some beautiful colors.

I used them with some stencils and they worked great. The smaller tip got close to the points of the stencils. The ink did not bleed so the stenciled stars turned out pretty good. The larger end was good for filling in the bigger areas of my stenciled stars. I played around with some shading just to see how they would work and that also looked great. The color of the first marker did not contaminate the tip of the second marker which I didn't expect so that was a definite plus.

I will be recommending these CeleMoon 48 Colors Alcohol Based Marker Pens to family and friends.

I have been wanting to do needle felting for a while now and this Needle Felting Starter Kit is perfect for beginners. The instructions are clear and easy to understand. It is a lot of fun.

The kit includes a frame, 3 pieces of felt, wool, several felting needles, a pattern, eyes, a little booble for the bell, a cylinder, and a glue stick. I needed a pen, a ruler and something sharp to insert the eyes. Mine doesn't look great yet, but I am still working on it.

I will be recommending this Needle Felting Starter Kit to family and friends. I have found a new craft so I will be ordering more needle felting projects in the future.

These DAPAWIN Calligraphy Brush Pens for Hand Lettering are great for a beginner like me to learn calligraphy. The different size tips help with the calligraphy strokes that I have had difficulty learning. I practiced a little last night and I was shocked at the difference these pens made for me.

The different tips are great to find the one that works for you. This set does not come with calligraphy instructions but the pens themselves are worth getting. I loved the way the ink looked from start to finish, a smooth even flow.

I will be recommending these DAPAWIN Calligraphy Brush Pens for Hand Lettering to family and friends.

These LWR CRAFTS Wooden Mini Clothespins are the perfect size for craft projects. I have plans for using them in two ways. On handmade cards and as a gift tag holder on packages. I may also use them as memo holders.

These mini clothespins are sturdy and appear to be of good quality. The little spring stays on the wooden part and they open just like the larger ones. I love the silver color of these and I think they will be perfect for Christmas.

I will be recommending these to friends and family.

The Brother CS5055 Computerized Sewing Machine is very easy to use. The instructions that come with it are very clear and helpful. Filling the bobbin was easy and dropping it in the holder was a breeze. The instruction for threading the machine was very clear, and there are pictures too. I love the needle threader; it was very easy to use.

I tried several of the stitches and stitch lengths and widths. I did try one of the decorative stitches and I didn't have the correct length, so my sample got jammed in the feed. The instructions for removing it was every easy to understand.

I will be recommending this Brother CS5055 Computerized Sewing Machine to family and friends. I have already told a few people and will be telling anyone that will listen how much I love this machine. I plan to try all 60 stitches and all 7 of the feet especially the buttonhole maker.

I made a yellow butterfly with this AmazonBasics Origami Paper. It folds perfectly and the creases are great. The paper did not tear or become weak. I plan to make a few more things with this paper. It was a lot of fun and I love the variety of colors. I will recommend it to my friends and family.

I make handmade cards for my customers. I put them in with the orders when I package them for shipping. I like to seal the envelope but I wanted the customer to open it without damage.  AmazonBasics Removable Glue Tape works perfectly for that. I will recommend this product to my family and friends.
This yarn is very soft and squishy. I knit a baby hat with it but I will be knitting more with this yarn.

I absolutely love this beautiful set of BIHRTC Professional 8 inch Sharp Scissors. I am a crafter and these scissors are just what I have been looking for. I will be giving these as gifts for my other crafting friends. I will be recommending these scissors to friends and family.

I absolutely love this 5D diamond painting. I am a crafter and this was easy and fun to do. Kids that love paint by numbers would love this. People who love to do cross-stitch would love this. I would recommend this fun 5D diamond painting to anybody who loves to try new crafty things.

I had never tried macrame before. The description said it had instructions so I gave it a try. The instructions are not for beginners but I found some YouTube videos that helped and then the instructions made more sense. This is a fun craft and I loved the cord. I will be doing more of this craft in the future and I will be looking for XKDOUS Macrame Cord.

I was a little confused at first on what pens were metallic, glitter, and so on. I have since determined each set and I love them. I have used them several times and will be using them more. Great product.
I crocheted several bracelets and needed caps for the ends. I love the look of these bead caps. They go perfectly with my bracelet colors.

I have been trying to measure my bracelets using a tape measure and measuring from the inside of the bracelet. It was a quick way to size them but not always accurate. I have a bracelet that I know the size of and I put it on the bracelet sizer and it was perfect. I have now measured 14 of my bracelet and I have a few more to go to make sure the size is accurate in inches and centimeters. Great product, I would recommend this to jewelry makers.
Beautiful, vibrant colors. The stamps I used come out beautifully. I am very happy with them.

I love this kit, I needed to make a card for my mom's birthday. She loves flowers so I thought I would try this paint kit. It was wonderful, the templates were perfect for what I needed and the paint looked great. My card was a hit. I just hate that I didn't take a pic to post with this review.
The kit has beautiful colors, in the paint and pencils. I loved the templates and the little samples of how to paint your masterpiece. I also loved the clear handle of the paintbrush.

I get nervous when I order glass beads online just because of the possibility that a fraction of them may break in the process of being sent to my home - but none of them were broken when I received these! The paint isn't always even 100% of the time, but that's not really a huge concern of mine - the majority of them have an even amount of each color. It says 200 pieces will come with the order - I haven't counted mine but there is a lot of them so even if I was cut short a couple I don't really mind.

I expected a few of the mushrooms to be broken just because they are small and made of glass. 4 of the mushrooms I received were broken, and a couple have cracks running across them that make me feel like they're about to break? I wouldn't feel comfortable making jewelry out of them just out of fear that they might break. I don't know if it's because of shipping or their quality that they were broken/cracked, but for the ones that are not broken - they're very cute! Each mushroom is about as big as a dime, maybe even slightly smaller. I'm tempted to order more, but with the uncertainty of how many may break during the process I'm not sure if the price is worth it for me since I only make jewelry as a hobby for myself.

Going back to the ones that are broken - I'm going to try and superglue them to see if that can fix them, but i'll probably find use for them in other projects than use them for jewelry instead.
