I've been using Winsor & Newton Brush Cleaner & Restorer for several years. I like to buy this in the large 32 oz. bottle, which is a great value. This does a great job cleaning brushes, but I primarily use it to remove previous paint (faceups) jobs from my Asian Ball-Jointed Dolls (BJDs) which I paint and seal myself. I use Mr. Super Clear matte/flat to seal the resin followed by acrylic paint, watercolor pencils and chalk pastels, then seal over each layer of my work. Sometimes, I want to re-paint my dolls. Winsor & Newton Brush Cleaner & Restorer removes the sealant and all of my other products from the doll without doing any damage to the resin material. Nothing else works as well. Sometimes I also use a Mr. Clean Magic Eraser for stubborn spots aided by a tooth brush for small creases. Usually a cosmetic cotton pad works well. The left over residue washes away easily with water and scent-free and dye free dish soap. After this treatment, my dolls are left as clean as if they were just removed from the mold by their artist/maker.

I also love Winsor & Newton Brush Cleaner & Restorer to clean my airbrush parts when I break them down for internal cleaning. Winsor & Newton Brush Cleaner & Restorer can be re-used, as I save my used product at times in a small glass jar. The used product works well for especially messy jobs as it sometimes takes a few washes with the product to remove the old paint.

I have only one issue with Winsor & Newton Brush Cleaner & Restorer. It melts my gloves, leaving a bigger mess than what I had in the first place. I work in the medical field and frequently wash my hands. My hands are a little rough, even during the best of times. The chemical components of Winsor & Newton Brush Cleaner & Restorer (likely ethanol) dry out my hands even further to the point of serious discomfort. Every glove type I have available at home including nitrile and latex melt when they come into contact with Winsor & Newton Brush Cleaner & Restorer. I have reached out to the manufacturing company and asked a question on this listing for a glove material suggestion to wear, and have never had a response. This leaves me with the choice of doing further damage to my hands each time I use the product, or avoiding one of my favorite hobby-related activities. Neither choice makes me very happy. I would like very much to have a suggestion for a chemically compatible glove material to use in the future.

Thanks for reading my review. I hope this has been helpful to you in some way, and you will kindly click the button below.

The 36 Joyful Colors in a Lightweight Metal Case doesn't really impress me, even for a budget watercolor set. The colors are not especially vibrant and seem to have more binding agents than comparable watercolor sets. Some colors are transparent, like purples and blues but yellows certainly have a more opaque quality along with oranges and reds, which tend to have a yellow color bias.

The metal tin lid is not hinged, but completely removes. A color chart is inside the top lid of the chipboard box. A small pad of paper is included along with 3 water brush pens. To open these pens, twist them the opposite way than what you may expect. I strongly suggest using distilled water with these and your watercolors to preserve the values of the pigments and to inhibit microbial growth.

The paint is overall very difficult to lift from the pans, another indication that too much binding agent is in the paint. There is no indication these paints are non-toxic and the compliance to ASTM D-4236 standards is vague on the packaging, therefor I cannot recommend this set for safe use by children. These may be suitable to someone that has a curious interest in watercolors, but I would not strongly suggest this set in particular since the pans are so hard to work. I feel a better value and quality can be found with other sets available in the same price range, or even for less. This set would not at all be suitable for upper-level students or for commission work, nor is it indicated to be appropriate for those artists' uses.

I can only award this set a 2-star rating at best, mostly due to the presentation and additional inclusions. This is not a set I would recommend, but it's not the worst watercolor set I have encountered. I hope you have found my review helpful and informative. If so, please kindly click the button below.

The Sethruki Watercolor Paint Set is a decent set of 36 half-pans with a very nice case/palette and 2 waterpen brushes. To open the brushpens, twist them the opposite direction than what you may be accustomed to doing. I strongly suggest using distilled water with your watercolors to keep the pigments as vibrant and possible and to prevent microbes from colonizing on your paint and brushpens.

The colors are vibrant, the red colors tend to have a blue bias, greens tend to have a yellow bias. They are nearly all transparent aside from any containing yellow pigments, so the binding agents are at a minimum for dry pan watercolors. The colors bloom well and they are easy to blend while wet, or over top of dry layers. Overall, this is a good performance for a budget quality set. I especially like the palette case as it has 5 cells that can be lifted into the opened lid to serve as a mixing palette, and the whole case can be held as pictured in the description. I have not seen this case before with other budget sets. A color chart is not included with the set or printed on the box, it is only listed in the photo section of the description.

The pouch is a thick felt, that protects the tools from protruding from the pouch, or from being marred while being stored. I really enjoyed this set to quickly weed some stencils I made myself. It was also handy to use with some frisket sheets. The tools would also come in handy for small, detailed sculpting of different mediums and are an all-around great set of tools for many types of crafting. I hope this review was helpful to you, and you will click the button below.

The milo Pro Heavy Body Acrylic Paint Set has all the basic colors, so you can make any other color yourself by blending them, use a color chart for reference. A palette knife is included to make this an easy task. I found the paint to be smooth and consistent and provide great coverage. I'm happy to note this is a product Made in the USA and is compliant to all art product safety regulations. I found they mixed easily with other acrylic mediums I had on hand. I'm overall pleased with this set and will likely deplete it.

The Bellofy 2 x Large Watercolor Paper Pads are a twin pack in large 11x14 sheets. This is great for me as that is a standard size of frame size. They are made with the cold-press technique, so they absorb the watercolor pigments beautifully. I did not find any issues with heavy saturation, and the fibers did not dislodge during blending on the wet paper. Each page tears away easily with little effort. I would recommend this to any hobbyist, for use by kids or anyone else that would appreciate a good value.

Jelife Crystal Clear UV/Epoxy Resin Dye set provides a great variety of pigments, you can even follow the color chart to make new pigments from others in the set. Simply shake each bottle and apply in accurate drops. The threaded lids keep them secure from leaks between uses. This is great for adding pigment to clear or transparent resin products while mixing the uncured resin. I would recommend this set to anyone that is interested in adding pigments to their uncured resin with a specialty product designed especially for that purpose.

The 8 Pieces Acrylic Clay Roller Set provides all the essential items needed for working with polymer clay. The clay knives are very sharp, so this is for adults only. The rollers are very long, thick and easy to handle. Two sized of knives are included, for larger sheets or bases of sculpture and a smaller one for smaller amounts of clay. This allows to lift the clay easily without distorting the form. The acrylic sheets are very small in comparison to the rollers and large clay knives, but are useful for very small amounts of clay. They are not a substitute for a primary work surface. I'm quite pleased with the set, and happily recommend it to anyone working in clay, these are essential tools that are simply worth having and a great value for all that is included.

This set of Unglazed Ceramic Tiles are ideal for home crafting to make your own custom coasters. Adhesive cork backing is included to attach to your finished tile. As they are unglazed, you are free to use a variety of mediums from pouring acrylic, alcohol ink, stamps or any other compatible paint. These can even be finished with poured epoxy resin for a professional look. This allows you to have a nice set of coasters that suits your decor perfectly, or allows little ones to do their own usable, memorable craft that is sure to be a hit among the household. The holder that is included makes keeping them neat and tidy a breeze. I'd recommend this to anyone that likes to do their own custom, usable artwork or as a great crafting activity to do with friends or family.

Small bags can leak too easily, so it's better to use Habbi 25 Pack 2OZ Empty Slime Containers. They are all uniform in size in a set and come with labels you can attach yourself. This makes organizing your homemade slime or other crafting products very easy. They have threaded lids, so you can be assured that your slime or other product will stay secure from leaking or drying out.

The 60 PCS Exacto Knife Blades will save you from attempting to cut with a dull blade ever again. The case is sturdy and keeps the waiting blades safe and sharp for use. The quantity should last the majority of us for a good time, but for those that do frequent cutting, you will find this is a great value! These are easy to use, just follow the instructions for your blade handle. I will be ordering this packet again when I deplete this supply, they are as good as any blades I have ever used, at a much better value than I have found before.

CLOWNFISH Silicone Domino Mold is an adorable mold, and a great size for a variety of DIY casting projects. If you wish to use this for candy or other edibles, make sure it is not contaminated with crafting products first. If you use this with crafting products like epoxy resin, it is not longer safe to use for edibles. The castings come out easily, as this is a good thickness of silicone to release without a releasing agent. I would recommend this to anyone that would enjoy making their own domino set, either from edible ingredients or in their hobby. The castings can make a great, unique DIY gift as well, and you can make several in a huge variety of styles/ colors. This is a fun way to spend time with loved ones as well. Have fun, happy crafting!

24 Colors Alcohol Ink Set Diffuse Liquid Pigment is great for anyone that wishes to dye their resin projects. It works well with embellishments too. The variety of colors are all that I would need or want. The bottles are small, but a little goes a long way. The lids fit onto the bottles tightly, so I am not concerned about any risk of spills. I would recommend this set to anyone getting started, as there are a good variety of colors. These are alcohol inks, so they can also be used for a variety of projects including paper and decorating unglazed tiles.

The OBSEDE 100Pcs Hollow Stainless Steel Charms are a great value for all that is included. I really love all the shapes, but the hearts have to be my favorite. These are easy to use with clear or tinted resin to make one-of-a-kind pendents for yourself or to share. These are a good value for the quality and certainly will be a welcomed addition for anyone learning to make their own jewelry using resin, polymer clay or UV curing resin. I would recommend this for the value and amount included in the set.

I'm very pleased with the Artecho Watercolor Paper Pad. The papers are easy to use and can be used with a variety of mediums. Watercolors require thick paper such as this. I did not find the paper loosing any fibers with heavy saturation, and it allowed me to blend colors, even a bit more roughly than I normally do. This is a tough paper and the fact that it is made with a cold press makes it very durable. The texture is good, not too smooth or soft, so enough tooth to also work well with chalk or oil pastels, acrylic or even charcoal and other types of pencils. I would recommend this paper for the quality and performance I have found. I will be ordering this again.

I'm very pleased with the Light Box Stand. It is already assembled and allows for multiple angels of your lightbox. In addition, I found it also hold cell phones and tablets very well on my desk/table tops. This is great for doing projects while following tutorials and not adding any strain to my wrists and making the best use of available environmental light in addition to the background of the lightbox. I would recommend this for sketching, completing diamond paintings and as an overall light-weight stand.

West Bay 60 Colors 1 oz/Block Oven Bake Modeling Clay Kit has made a lot of fun times in my house. All you need is a surface to work and bake upon and an oven. This provides a great variety of colors. Compared to hobby/crafting shop clays, this is a good value for all that is included. The entire kit fits neatly in the plastic box for storage between uses. There is a great sampling set of findings for jewelry making, basic sculpting tools and glitter for decorative embellishment. Some colors will rub off on hands, so start with the lighter colors first. I found a couple to be a little too soft/tacky, but pressing them onto plain, blank typing paper relieved some of the extra plasticizer. I would recommend this for all that is included and the quality of the clay is fair to good.

I have every color of fun glitter colors all in one set. They are easy to organize as they come in their own jars. I found this really easy to use, and the clear containers don't distort the colors when I'm making a selection. This is great for a variety of activities ranging from nail art, resin art projects and goes well with a clear tacky glue.

The DIY Candle Making kit comes with everything I need to make my own little candles. The tins included are absolutely adorable. Lovely scents, wax, wicks.... everything is there! I don't have to guess which products go with what with a kit, and this is a great way to start. I would recommend this as a gift, for someone else or yourself!

This key mold is much cuter in person! The detailing is deep, and each one comes with a hole to use the finished product as a pendent if you so choose. They are not very thick, so they are also UV resin friendly. If you wanted to use them for party favors, they would be awesome if you wanted to have an Alice themed tea party. I'm really happy with the quality of the mold and am excited cast with it.

Mostof 39 Pack Resin Jewelry Making Kit includes a little bit of everything to use with your choice of resin to make beautiful projects. I really like the tiny gears! For that special sparkle, you get mica powder, chunky and fine glitter. This is great not only for resin, but for mixing into glue, adding a special something to decoupage or even acrylic paint varnish. The possibilities are only limited by imagination. For all that is included, this is a tremendous value! I highly recommend this to any crafter or hobbyist.

All of the alphabet is here, along with some common symbols. This set from 1st Place Products is much better quality than what I had considered purchasing at a chain hobby store, at a much better price point. These can be used on a variety of materials, like some metals, wood, plastics, etc.... The case is hard plastic and ideal for storing the stamps. They are lightly lubricated with an oil for protection as they are solid metal. This is a great value for the quality, and I would highly recommend this over other sets I have used or handled. Thanks for reading, if this is Helpful, please click the button below.

This set has a great variety of colors. All of the classic colors I would purchase separately are included, they are vibrant. I did not find the binders in the paint to be a hindrance in any way, they spread easily. They blend well. The packaging makes it easy to use for storage between uses. I would highly recommend this set to hobbyists, as it is a good value for the quality and variety of paints. I would not recommend this set for professional work or upper-level students, but this is not marketed towards those users. I'm very happy with the performance of the paint and would re-order this set with no hesitations. Thanks for reading, if it was Helpful, please click the button below.

Rubber Carving Blocks with 12 Carving Knifes brings me back to my art class days. It has been a little while since I made my own print blocks, but this set was just as easy to use as the ones I had used in school. I learned to carve on linoleum, so compared to that, these are like butter! I like to do small projects and sometimes use stamps. I do not like to purchase whole sets of stamps when I only want to use one, so, this is a great set for my purposes. I've been keen to make my own, and I'm glad to have taken the time to do so. The tools are alright, they are not professional quality, but they do the job. The package is good, and I'm keeping it to store the set between uses. I find the set to be a fair to good value for all that is included and would recommend this to any ADULT hobbyist. This would also make a great gift to anyone that would like to do their own decorations with ink, paint, on wood, plastics, fabric.... etc. Thanks for reading, if this was Helpful to you, please click the button below.

Jucoci Wet Palette is a good size for me, and it's very easy to use. I put distilled water in mine to save my paint products from the additives from my municipal supply. This palette is nice to use, but I will not take it for traveling as it does not seal very well. This type of palette is great for water-based paints like gouache, acrylic and watercolors from a tube. I find it to be a fair value for the quality and performance.

I found Micro-Mark MTP Moldable Thermoplastic easy to use. I used a heat gun after cutting out the designs I wished to mold. I would recommend these as it's a fair to good value and the performance is what I expected.

Mont Marte Signature Gouache Paint is a wonderful set to begin using gouache. It is a water-based paint, so you may thin it for a longer working time with water. I highly suggest using distilled water with art supplies, it is inexpensive and readily available from your local grocer. The paint is smooth, and easy to thin, no clumps. The tubes are sufficient in quantity for a multitude of studies. The packaging is sturdy and works well for storage between uses. The value is fair for the quantity, quality and price. This is an ideal set for amateur artists, young artists and hobbyists. I would not recommend it for upper-level students or professional artists as some vital information is lacking, such as colorfastness. However, this paint set is not marketed for that consumer group. I'm quite pleased with this set and would recommend it to others with interest. Thanks for reading my review. If you found it Helpful, please click the button below.

Hero Arts CLEAR STMP BUGS is a really nice set. The material feels very solid and durable, and the tack is great for my block. It takes ink, versa ink and lift medium equally well. I'd highly recommend this set as it's adorable, in great sizes for a variety of stamping products and is made very well. I expect this set to last a very long time.

I like to go over my acrylic compositions with acrylic sealant. The best way to apply sealant is with an airbrush, and this one did a fantastic job! I have the choice of 2 reservoirs for my product, so I don't need to worry about coming up short while in the middle of my work. This is incredibly small compared to my larger setup, and accomplishes the same job using much less space. I would highly recommend Autolock Upgraded Airbrush Kit for the value and quality. This would make a great introduction to any new airbrush artist, or anyone like me, that likes to experience a variety of applications with their mediums. I appreciate the inclusion of the cleaning brushes, as it saves the user from making a separate purchase or doing without. I do strongly recommend using distilled water in your airbrush. It's always useful to become familiar with the cleaning process and breaking down the brush so you are able to re-assemble after use. Your airbrush will last a very long time and preform very well with proper cleaning, maintenance and storage. The battery charges easily with a USB-C cord that is included. The box makes for a nice presentation and also is very sturdy to serve for protective storage between uses. Thanks for reading, if my review was Helpful, kindly click the button below.

I like this set overall, but it has some flaws. The TOKSEO 4 Pounds DIY Candle Making Kit comes with a pitcher, tins, long spoons, a silicone resting mat and some wicks with wick holders. I love the tins, they are really pretty and the wicks and holders work really well. The pitcher is very, very thin. I own a few wax melting pitchers and this is the thinnest metal I have ever used. It bends very easily. On the upside, it does conduct heat very quickly. This creates some mixed feelings and I do not find this to be an overall good value. I wouldn't strongly discourage anyone to purchase this set, but I have had better pitchers in the same price range. If the full set is something you are after, this may be a good value for you. In my case, it just creates mixed feelings and I don't feel strongly one way or another. I hope this information is Helpful to you, and you will click the button below.

ADAXI 36 Color Watercolor Paints Set is one of my favorite sets I have used. The reason is the colors are very reflective of those found in nature. The yellow was slightly opaque, otherwise this is a nice set of very transparent colors. Blooming and blending were both easy to achieve, so you can do many different effects using these methods. I did not find the binding agents to inhibit use or spread. The tin comes in a box and features a small palette in the lid. You also get a watercolor pen brush. It opens the opposite way you would expect. I always use distilled water with my art supplies, and this works well for the pen too. A sponge is also included, it is blue. I appreciate the color chart, and a folded piece of watercolor is also included to make your own swatch of the colors in the set.

This is a really nice budget set. If you follow your color theories and mind the color biases, you can get some really nice compositions. This is a good value for budding artists, hobbyists and anyone that would like to experiment with watercolors. I would recommend this to anyone except upper-level students and professional artists, but this isn't a set marketed to those groups anyway.

The only downside to this is that I cannot locate any verification this is a non-toxic set, and it also does not have any official seals regarding the ASTM D4236 standards, but it is printed on the box. I would not recommend this for small children for this reason, and due to the set containing small parts that could pose a choking hazard.

This would make and excellent gift or stocking-stuffer. Thanks so much for reading my review. If it was Helpful, please click the button below.

We've been turning all sorts of items into magnets and key chains. This is a great set of findings to make A LOT of key chains. This keeps the kids busy with their hands and also helps them feel a little less sad about missing all their friends. This set has enough findings to make 50 key chains. The kids also really like to make small items into backpack buddies, which is great as the lobster claw claps allows this to be very easy. I'd highly recommend this set to anyone that would like to craft their own gifts, or give a purpose to items they make from a variety of materials. Thanks for reading my review. The VIBIRIT 49PCS Mandala Dotting Tools is a really great set. I really like the blank wooden circles that are included, along with the tabletop easel. All the tools you need to get started to paint your mandalas are include. Just select your own paint! The variety of dotting tools is excellent. They are metal and washable, these should last most of us for a very long time. The brushes are okay, not the best but they will do the job. The stencils are plastic, so they are also washable. Gem stone stickers are really fun. I like that a bag for the tools is also included, it makes cleanup so much easier! I'd highly recommend this set to anyone interested to start painting their own mandalas, or anyone that has use for a great variety of tools to add. This is a great value for all that is included and would make a very nice gift for all levels of skill. I would not recommend this set for very small children, as the smaller parts are a choking hazard. Thanks for reading. I hope you found it Helpful and will click the button below.

The 43 LINGIFTIN Acrylic Paint Marker set has the best to offer from both markers and acrylic paint. This set has a really great selection of colors. You get an extra white, black and pink. This is great for me because I like to use black and white a lot. Each marker has a ball inside to mix the paint, so you will need to shake the marker each time you want to use it, and the first use requires you to prime it, first shaking, then pressing it on a surface until the paint penetrates the tip of the marker. Then, you get to enjoy the benefits of acrylic paint, like much less bleeding than alcohol markers and finer lines. I'd highly recommend these to older kids and adults. I would avoid letting smaller children have access to these markers as they are not as easy to use as some, the tip is very firm and the caps pose a choking hazard. These are great markers for teens and adults. Thanks for reading my review. I hope you found it Helpful and will click the button below.

Jacquard Silver Metallic Pinata Alcohol Ink is incredibly shiny and beautiful. I used it on Yupo paper with and without the blending solution and coated some on a polymer clay piece. The squiggles I made using the application bottle from Modify. The application bottle makes all the difference and it does come with a tiny funnel. Do put a little space between the bottle you are filling while pouring to give the air a place to escape and keep it clean. This alcohol ink cleaned easily from my glass working surface with isopropyl alcohol. If you want an alternative way to thin the ink, use a high proof clear grain alcohol, it is an ethanol and works really great to thin the ink. This ink can also be mixed into many different types of resin or mixed into uncured polymer clay. I had a really fantastic time working with the Jacquard Alcohol Ink and will definitely be adding more colors to my supplies. The SDS is available from the company. This is not a product for children, this is not suitable for people that cannot be responsible and careful with their art supplies. It can make a big mess and damage some surfaces. I used glass that was over a silicone mat. This is a product that is high-quality and is often used by upper-level students and professional artists. I consider this a great value for the quality, quantity and inclusion of the application bottle. I would highly recommend this, as it's a very good product. I'm very impressed. Thanks for reading my review. I hope you have found it Helpful and will click the button below.

My teen had a great time using 1st Place Products 36 Piece 4mm Metal Stamp Set to stamp some metal blanks to make some custom teen-friendly jewelry. It's hard to find things for teens to do while they miss their friends but using some tools to craft their own custom items is a great way to be expressive and creative. The stamps are organized well in a plastic box and lightly lubricated to avoid rust. They work really well on a protected surface with a ball pin hammer. We've used metal blanks and did some dart board embellishments with an empty soda can. These are easy to use and a really nice quality. I consider the value good, especially compared to what is offered at the local crafting store. I'd recommend this to anyone that would like to do some pressure stamping on a variety of surfaces. I would not recommend these for smaller children as they do take a bit of pressure with a hammer to stamp on most surfaces. Thanks for reading, if it was Helpful, please click the button below.

This 32 Colors Alcohol Art Markers is a great set. You find a huge variety of colors, and the best part is there is a fine and blunted tip for each color, as they are duel tipped. This is more bang for the buck, and less storage space versus some markers. It was always annoying to have more than one marker of the same color, only because they tips are different, this set solves that frustration. This is a good set for anyone that likes to sketch or even just doodle. I do not see anywhere that these markers are certified as being non-toxic, so I would not recommend them for children. I find these to be a good value and the quality on on par with name brand markers I own. Thanks for reading, if this was Helpful, please click the button below.

The Extra Large Silicone Mat 23.6 x 15.7 inches is the perfect size to protect my work surface. I also put it underneath my glass tray when I'm using alcohol inks or polymer clay, as any excess materials or cleaning products will be caught my the mat. Many different messy art mediums will clean up easily from silicone, like resin, most inks, most paints, most clays and so on. This is not so true of my finished wood table underneath the mat, so this is a great barrier when I want the added space of my large table. It also folds or rolls to take up very little storage space between uses. It cleans easily and dries just as fast. I'd highly recommend this as it's a great size for most crafting projects. Thanks for reading, if it was Helpful, please click the button below.

I did find a few too many hairs, or bristles to be loose in the Dainayw Watercolor Paint Brushes than I would have expected. This isn't a deal-breaker, but I was not too happy to find this. After a bit of use, the shedding seems to have stopped for now. I don't feel that these are a particularly bad or good set of brushes, they are fair quality for the price. I'd recommend them but note they may need some care before using in paint to get the best results.

I used Sugru to repair a plastic piece in my refrigerator. I removed the piece so it could set in room temperature. It was not difficult to apply, but the curing took much longer than I expected. I'm satisfied with the results and would recommend it for general household purposes, depending on the expectations for use.

Stackable Plastic Storage Containers by Bins & Things can be wall mounted many different ways, of course it also works well on a desk or bench top. I use this to store my different sewing pins. The clear drawers let me see inside, and they slide out easily. I can take out a small drawer and easily put it back when I am done. I like the size and it's study yet light weight. I'd certainly recommend this bin for anyone that needs to store their small things where they will not easily spill, but be readily accessible.

All you will need is some glue to have a great time with the kids using ZALALOVA 476Pcs MSDS Approved Christmas Tree Ornaments. String, pom-poms, eyes and several other embellishments are included. There is a good variety of shapes well-suited for Christmas. I found all the surfaces to be smooth and the kids had a good time. These would also be very adorable as tags for handmade gifts. I'd highly recommend these to anyone that would enjoy having fun decorating their own ornaments or gift tags. Thanks for reading my review. If it was Helpful, please click the button below.

KGMCARE Carrying Case will hold a cricut joy, but I'm using it to hold my polymer clay tools. I have a lot that I've accumulated and the plastic shoe-box I was using was much too small. This is a great case to hold all sorts of things as it's sturdy and has a removable pouch inside, I put clay packets in there and use the other pocket and elastic side for my rollers, dotting tools, blades and whatever else I've accumulated for clay sculpting. It's sturdy and I love that it has a strap. Sometimes I go to my friends' homes and we craft together, so this cuts down on the bulk I would otherwise be carrying with me. I had several separate packages of markers. It was always a pain to sort through them so I transferred them all into the Enyuwlcm Heavy Canvas Stationery Large Pencil Bag. I'd recommend this to anyone that needs a carrying case for their writing utensils as it's very sturdy and I think this will last me a very long time.

The Shiny Stone Glow in Dark Round Beads are plastic, not glass. I also found them to be a little smaller than as described. These were suppose to be 6mm, but they are a little smaller, closer to 4.5mm. This is fine for my uses though. I choose the Sky Blue, they are very pretty and do glow blue, even in low light. They are packaged well and are uniform in shape, well-formed. I'd recommend these beads to anyone that would like to have fun with some photoluminescence incorporated into their bead work. I found the Artist Charcoal Pencils Set satisfying to use and very straight-forward. They sharpened well and the charcoal was consistent on my paper. It's good that there is 3 different textures to the pencils, so it's easy to do different types of shading and outlines. I'd recommend this for casual sketching, for adults as the nature of charcoal is just a little messier than I would trust most children to use.

There are many nice things I have to say about this 148 Pieces Resin Jewelry Making Starter Kit. This is excellent for me as I'm using UV resin in my garage (with full PPE). These molds are very small, and can fit under a UV lamp intended for gel nails very easily. There's a little bit of every sort of small mold in the kit. It also comes with some eyelet findings, 12 glitter/confetti inclusions, stirring spoons, stirring paddles, and pipettes. This has nearly all the items you need to start. You just need your own PPE and resin! My favorite mold is the single tiny cat face mold. The bracelet and ring mold are on the smaller side. It's so cute! The pin vise has 4 different bits. You will find the second duel-sided collet in the handle of the pin vise. This will also work with polymer clay, so it's a nice set that can be used in a versatile way. If you choose to try polymer clay, set the mold with the clay inside in your freezer for a few minutes before popping the unbaked clay out, then it will keep it's shape very nicely. I'd highly recommend this to anyone that loves tiny crafting activities, using UV or other types of resin or even polymer clay! I would not recommend this for small children or anyone that cannot refrain from putting small objects into their mouth as the small parts are a choking hazard. Thanks so much for reading my review. The DROLE 50Pcs Open Bezels is really fun! You get 10 different designs of pendents in four different finishes, a roll of tape and a 12 cell box of dried flowers and greenery. The bezels are also finished nicely, but still costume jewelry quality. This is good because I bought some before from someone else, and they were not finished well at all. Pencil Buddies Professional Drawing Sketching Art Pencil Set is great for casual sketching or drawing. 12 Pcs 4"-4.7" Unfinished Wood Slices is a great material for creativity. I tried laser embossing, inks and even paint on them and they took all my materials and methods well. I'm very, very pleased with Mandala Dotting Tools Set. It has everything I need. I really like the pretty colors used to make the acrylic rods.
